title: croton fruticulosus
intro: Croton fruticulosus, also known as the Mexican croton or croton, is a small shrub native to Mexico and parts of the United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Croton fruticulosus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also sometimes used in topical applications to accelerate healing and reduce inflammation.
